存储启动的监听器\n    const watchers: Array<{ stop: () => void; syncNow: () => void }> = [];\n    \n    // 尝试启动 Cursor 监听\n    const cursorDbPath = getCursorDatabasePath();\n    if (fs.existsSync(cursorDbPath)) {\n        console.log('Cursor database found, starting Cursor watcher');\n        const cursorWatcher = new DatabaseWatcher(cursorDbPath, workspaceRoot, localeSetting);\n        cursorWatcher.start();\n        watchers.push(cursorWatcher);\n    } else {\n        console.log('Cursor database not found:', cursorDbPath);\n    }\n    \n    // 尝试启动 Cline 监听\n    const clineStoragePath = getClineStoragePath();\n    if (fs.existsSync(clineStoragePath)) {\n        console.log('[Cline] Storage found, starting watcher');\n        const clineWatcher = new ClineWatcher(clineStoragePath, workspaceRoot, localeSetting);\n        clineWatcher.start();\n        watchers.push(clineWatcher);\n    } else {\n        console.log('[Cline] Storage not found');\n    }\n\n    // 尝试启动 Codex (GitHub Copilot Chat) 监听\n    const codexStoragePath = getCodexStoragePath();\n    if (fs.existsSync(codexStoragePath)) {\n        console.log('Codex storage found, starting Codex watcher');\n        const codexWatcher = new CodexWatcher(codexStoragePath, workspaceRoot, localeSetting);\n        codexWatcher.start();\n        watchers.push(codexWatcher);\n    } else {\n        console.log('Codex storage not found:', codexStoragePath);\n    }\n\n    // 尝试启动 Blackbox AI 监听\n    const blackboxStoragePath = getBlackboxStoragePath();\n    if (fs.existsSync(blackboxStoragePath)) {\n        console.log('Blackbox AI storage found, starting Blackbox AI watcher');\n        const blackboxWatcher = new BlackboxWatcher(blackboxStoragePath, workspaceRoot, localeSetting);\n        blackboxWatcher.start();\n        watchers.push(blackboxWatcher);\n    } else {\n        console.log('Blackbox AI storage not found:', blackboxStoragePath);\n    }\n\n    // 尝试启动 CodeGeeX 监听\n    const codegeexStoragePath = getCodeGeeXStoragePath();\n    if (fs.existsSync(codegeexStoragePath)) {\n        console.log('CodeGeeX storage found, starting CodeGeeX watcher');\n        const codegeexWatcher = new CodeGeeXWatcher(codegeexStoragePath, workspaceRoot, localeSetting);\n        codegeexWatcher.start();\n        watchers.push(codegeexWatcher);\n    } else {\n        console.log('CodeGeeX storage not found:', codegeexStoragePath);\n    }\n\n    // 尝试启动 Kilo 监听\n    const kiloStoragePath = getKiloStoragePath();\n    if (fs.existsSync(kiloStoragePath)) {\n        console.log('Kilo storage found, starting Kilo watcher');\n        const kiloWatcher = new KiloWatcher(kiloStoragePath, workspaceRoot, localeSetting);\n        kiloWatcher.start();\n        watchers.push(kiloWatcher);\n    } else {\n        console.log('Kilo storage not found:', kiloStoragePath);\n    }\n    \n    // 如果没有找到任何聊天历史\n    if (watchers.length === 0) {\n        console.warn('No chat history sources found (Cursor, Cline, Codex, Blackbox AI, CodeGeeX, or Kilo)');\n        vscode.window.showWarningMessage(\n            'LLM Chat History: No supported AI plugins found. Please install and use Cursor, Cline, GitHub Copilot Chat, Blackbox AI, CodeGeeX, or Kilo.'\n        );\n        return;\n    }\n    \n    // 注册命令：手动保存\n    const saveCommand = vscode.commands.registerCommand(\n        'chatHistory.saveNow',\n        () => {\n            for (const watcher of watchers) {\n                watcher.syncNow();\n            }\n            vscode.window.showInformationMessage(t('info.saved'));\n        }\n    );\n    \n    context.subscriptions.push(saveCommand, {\n        dispose: () => {\n            for (const watcher of watchers) {\n                watcher.stop();\n            }\n        }\n    });\n    \n    console.log(`LLM Chat History Extension ready (${watchers.length} source(s))`);\n}\n\n/**\n * 扩展停用时调用\n */\nexport function deactivate() {\n    console.log('LLM Chat History Extension deactivated');\n}\n\n/**\n * 获取 Cursor 数据库路径\n */\nfunction getCursorDatabasePath(): string {\n    const platform = process.platform;\n    const homeDir = process.env.HOME || process.env.USERPROFILE || '';\n    \n    if (platform === 'win32') {\n        return path.join(\n            homeDir,\n            'AppData/Roaming/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb'\n        );\n    } else if (platform === 'darwin') {\n        return path.join(\n            homeDir,\n            'Library/Application Support/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb'\n        );\n    } else {\n        // Linux\n        return path.join(\n            homeDir,\n            '.config/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb'\n        );\n    }\n}\n\n\n",

}

## 🤖 Assistant #39 (Agent)

_2025-12-24 13:28Z_

## 🏆 **建议优先级和实施路径**

### **第一阶段 (3-6个月) - 核心体验提升**
1. **即时搜索功能** - 最高优先级，用户最需要的功能
2. **历史面板界面** - 提升可用性
3. **状态栏指示器** - 增强用户感知
4. **智能通知系统** - 改进反馈机制

### **第二阶段 (6-12个月) - 数据管理增强**
1. **标签和分类系统** - 组织大量对话
2. **批量操作功能** - 提高效率
3. **对话清理工具** - 管理存储空间

### **第三阶段 (12个月+) - 协作和高级功能**
1. **云同步功能** - 跨设备访问 (商业化机会)
2. **团队分享功能** - 企业用户需求
3. **分析面板** - 数据驱动的洞察

## 💡 **技术架构建议**

1. **数据库升级**: 从文件系统考虑迁移到轻量级数据库 (SQLite已在用，继续扩展)

2. **插件化架构**: 为新AI工具支持设计插件系统，降低维护成本

3. **渐进式增强**: 保持核心功能的稳定性，新功能作为可选模块

4. **性能监控**: 添加性能指标收集，为优化提供数据支撑

## 🎯 **商业化潜力**

你的插件已经展现出强大的实用价值，可以考虑：

- **免费核心功能 + 高级功能收费模式**
- **企业版**: 团队协作、云同步、优先支持
- **个人高级版**: 更多导出格式、自定义模板、深度分析

这个项目的基础架构非常扎实，有很大的扩展空间！你的下一步发展方向应该聚焦在提升用户体验和数据管理能力上，这些都是用户最关心的核心需求。

{
  "contents": "/**\r\n * 类型定义文件\r\n * 基于 Cursor SQLite 数据库实际结构\r\n */\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * Composer Data - 对话容器\r\n */\r\nexport interface ComposerData {\r\n    _v: number;\r\n    composerId: string;\r\n    name: string;\r\n    createdAt: string;\r\n    lastUpdatedAt?: string;\r\n    \r\n    // 对话引用列表（关键！）\r\n    fullConversationHeadersOnly: Array<{\r\n        bubbleId: string;\r\n        type: number; // 1=用户消息, 2=AI响应\r\n    }>;\r\n    \r\n    // 其他元数据\r\n    text: string;\r\n    richText: string;\r\n    modelConfig: {\r\n        modelName: string;\r\n    };\r\n    unifiedMode: number; // 1=Chat, 2=Agent\r\n    isAgentic: boolean;\r\n}\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * 用户消息 Bubble (Type 1)\r\n */\r\nexport interface UserBubble {\r\n    _v: number;\r\n    type: 1;\r\n    bubbleId: string;\r\n    requestId: string;\r\n    createdAt: string;\r\n    \r\n    // 用户输入内容\r\n    text: string;\r\n    richText: string;\r\n    \r\n    // 上下文信息\r\n    modelInfo?: {\r\n        modelName: string;\r\n    };\r\n    unifiedMode?: number;\r\n    isAgentic?: boolean;\r\n    workspaceUris?: string[];\r\n    workspaceProjectDir?: string;\r\n}\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * AI 响应 Bubble (Type 2)\r\n */\r\nexport interface AIResponseBubble {\r\n    _v: number;\r\n    type: 2;\r\n    bubbleId: string;\r\n    requestId: string;\r\n    createdAt: string;\r\n    capabilityType?: number;\r\n    \r\n    // AI 响应内容\r\n    text: string;\r\n    \r\n    // AI 思考过程（thinking models）\r\n    thinking?: {\r\n        text: string;\r\n        signature: string;\r\n    };\r\n    thinkingStyle?: number;\r\n    \r\n    // 时间信息\r\n    timingInfo?: {\r\n        clientStartTime: number;\r\n        clientRpcSendTime: number;\r\n        clientSettleTime: number;\r\n        clientEndTime: number;\r\n    };\r\n    \r\n    // 模型信息\r\n    modelInfo?: {\r\n        modelName: string;\r\n    };\r\n    \r\n    // 工具调用结果\r\n    toolResults?: Array<{\r\n        name: string;\r\n        result: any;\r\n    }>;\r\n    \r\n    // 工具调用（capabilityType === 15）\r\n    toolFormerData?: ToolFormerData | null;\r\n    \r\n    unifiedMode?: number;\r\n    isAgentic?: boolean;\r\n    workspaceUris?: string[];\r\n    workspaceProjectDir?: string;\r\n}\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * Bubble 联合类型\r\n */\r\nexport type Bubble = UserBubble | AIResponseBubble;\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * 消息结构（用于 Markdown 生成）\r\n */\r\nexport interface Message {\r\n    id: string;\r\n    type: 'user' | 'assistant' | 'system';\r\n    text: string;\r\n    thinking?: string;\r\n    timestamp: string;\r\n    modelName?: string;\r\n    mode?: string;\r\n    context?: any; // 上下文信息，如文件路径、代码选择等\r\n    toolResults?: Array<{\r\n        name: string;\r\n        result: any;\r\n    }>;\r\n    toolUses?: ToolUseBlock[];\r\n    images?: string[]; // 图片附件\r\n}\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * 数据库行结构\r\n */\r\nexport interface DatabaseRow {\r\n    key: string;\r\n    value: any; // BLOB or TEXT\r\n}\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * Cursor 工具调用原始数据\r\n */\r\nexport interface ToolFormerData {\r\n    name: string;\r\n    tool: string;\r\n    toolCallId: string;\r\n    toolIndex: number;\r\n    modelCallId?: string;\r\n    status?: string;\r\n    rawArgs?: string;\r\n    params?: any;\r\n    result?: string;\r\n    additionalData?: any;\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport interface ToolUseBlock {\r\n    name: string;\r\n    markdown: string;\r\n}\r\n\r\n\r\n",

}

{
  "file_path": "src/search-index.ts",
  "old_string": "",
  "new_string": "/**\n * 搜索索引管理器\n * 负责建立和维护聊天记录的搜索索引\n */\n\nimport * as Database from 'better-sqlite3';\nimport * as path from 'path';\nimport * as fs from 'fs';\nimport { Message } from './types';\n\nexport interface SearchResult {\n    conversationId: string;\n    messageId: string;\n    timestamp: string;\n    content: string;\n    type: 'user' | 'assistant' | 'tool';\n    score: number;\n    highlights?: string[]; // 匹配的关键词\n}\n\nexport interface SearchIndexEntry {\n    id: string;\n    conversationId: string;\n    messageId: string;\n    content: string;\n    timestamp: string;\n    type: 'user' | 'assistant' | 'tool';\n    tokens: string[]; // 分词后的关键词\n    metadata: {\n        modelName?: string;\n        toolName?: string;\n        filePaths?: string[];\n        codeSnippets?: string[];\n    };\n}\n\nexport class SearchIndexManager {\n    private db: Database.Database;\n    private initialized: boolean = false;\n\n    constructor(private workspaceRoot: string) {\n        const indexPath = path.join(workspaceRoot, '.llm-chat-history', 'search-index.db');\n        this.ensureIndexDirectory(indexPath);\n        this.db = new Database(indexPath);\n    }\n\n    private ensureIndexDirectory(indexPath: string) {\n        const dir = path.dirname(indexPath);\n        if (!fs.existsSync(dir)) {\n            fs.mkdirSync(dir, { recursive: true });\n        }\n    }\n\n    async initialize() {\n        if (this.initialized) return;\n\n        // 创建搜索索引表\n        this.db.exec(`\n            CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS search_index (\n                id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,\n                conversation_id TEXT NOT NULL,\n                message_id TEXT NOT NULL,\n                content TEXT NOT NULL,\n                timestamp TEXT NOT NULL,\n                type TEXT NOT NULL,\n                tokens TEXT NOT NULL, -- JSON array of tokens\n                metadata TEXT, -- JSON metadata\n                created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n                updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP\n            );\n\n            CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_conversation_id ON search_index(conversation_id);\n            CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_timestamp ON search_index(timestamp);\n            CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_type ON search_index(type);\n            CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE IF NOT EXISTS fts_content USING fts5(\n                content, content='search_index', content_rowid='rowid'\n            );\n\n            -- 创建更新触发器\n            CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS search_index_update_trigger\n            AFTER UPDATE ON search_index\n            BEGIN\n                UPDATE search_index SET updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = NEW.id;\n            END;\n        `);\n\n        this.initialized = true;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 为消息建立搜索索引\n     */\n    async indexMessage(conversationId: string, message: Message) {\n        await this.initialize();\n\n        const id = `${conversationId}_${message.id}`;\n        const tokens = this.tokenize(message.text);\n        const metadata = this.extractMetadata(message);\n\n        const insert = this.db.prepare(`\n            INSERT OR REPLACE INTO search_index\n            (id, conversation_id, message_id, content, timestamp, type, tokens, metadata)\n            VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)\n        `);\n\n        insert.run(\n            id,\n            conversationId,\n            message.id,\n            message.text,\n            message.timestamp,\n            message.type,\n            JSON.stringify(tokens),\n            JSON.stringify(metadata)\n        );\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 全文搜索\n     */\n    async search(query: string, options: {\n        limit?: number;\n        offset?: number;\n        conversationId?: string;\n        type?: 'user' | 'assistant' | 'tool';\n        startDate?: string;\n        endDate?: string;\n    } = {}): Promise<SearchResult[]> {\n        await this.initialize();\n\n        const { limit = 50, offset = 0, conversationId, type, startDate, endDate } = options;\n\n        let whereClause = '1=1';\n        const params: any[] = [];\n\n        if (conversationId) {\n            whereClause += ' AND conversation_id = ?';\n            params.push(conversationId);\n        }\n\n        if (type) {\n            whereClause += ' AND type = ?';\n            params.push(type);\n        }\n\n        if (startDate) {\n            whereClause += ' AND timestamp >= ?';\n            params.push(startDate);\n        }\n\n        if (endDate) {\n            whereClause += ' AND timestamp <= ?';\n            params.push(endDate);\n        }\n\n        // 使用FTS5进行全文搜索\n        const searchQuery = `\n            SELECT si.*, highlight(fts_content, 0, '<mark>', '</mark>') as highlighted\n            FROM search_index si\n            JOIN fts_content ON si.rowid = fts_content.rowid\n            WHERE fts_content MATCH ?\n            AND ${whereClause}\n            ORDER BY bm25(fts_content) * (1 + (julianday('now') - julianday(si.timestamp)) * 0.1)\n            LIMIT ? OFFSET ?\n        `;\n\n        const stmt = this.db.prepare(searchQuery);\n        const results = stmt.all(query, ...params, limit, offset);\n\n        return results.map(row => ({\n            conversationId: row.conversation_id,\n            messageId: row.message_id,\n            timestamp: row.timestamp,\n            content: row.content,\n            type: row.type,\n            score: 0, // 可以基于BM25分数计算\n            highlights: this.extractHighlights(row.highlighted || row.content, query)\n        }));\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 分词处理\n     */\n    private tokenize(text: string): string[] {\n        // 简单的分词逻辑，可以扩展为更复杂的中文分词\n        return text\n            .toLowerCase()\n            .replace(/[^\\w\\u4e00-\\u9fff]+/g, ' ')\n            .split(/\\s+/)\n            .filter(token => token.length > 1)\n            .map(token => token.replace(/[^\\w\\u4e00-\\u9fff]/g, ''));\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 提取元数据\n     */\n    private extractMetadata(message: Message): SearchIndexEntry['metadata'] {\n        const metadata: SearchIndexEntry['metadata'] = {};\n\n        if (message.modelName) {\n            metadata.modelName = message.modelName;\n        }\n\n        // 提取工具调用信息\n        if (message.toolUses && message.toolUses.length > 0) {\n            metadata.toolName = message.toolUses[0].name;\n        }\n\n        // 提取文件路径\n        if (message.context && typeof message.context === 'object') {\n            const context = message.context as any;\n            if (context.workspaceUris) {\n                metadata.filePaths = context.workspaceUris;\n            }\n        }\n\n        // 提取代码片段（简单的正则匹配）\n        const codeBlocks = message.text.match(/```[\\w]*\\n([\\s\\S]*?)```/g);\n        if (codeBlocks) {\n            metadata.codeSnippets = codeBlocks.map(block =>\n                block.replace(/```\\w*\\n?/, '').replace(/```$/, '')\n            );\n        }\n\n        return metadata;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 提取高亮关键词\n     */\n    private extractHighlights(content: string, query: string): string[] {\n        const queryWords = query.toLowerCase().split(/\\s+/);\n        const highlights: string[] = [];\n\n        queryWords.forEach(word => {\n            if (content.toLowerCase().includes(word)) {\n                highlights.push(word);\n            }\n        });\n\n        return highlights;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 删除对话的索引\n     */\n    async removeConversationIndex(conversationId: string) {\n        await this.initialize();\n\n        const stmt = this.db.prepare('DELETE FROM search_index WHERE conversation_id = ?');\n        stmt.run(conversationId);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 清理过期索引（可选）\n     */\n    async cleanupOldIndexes(daysOld: number = 90) {\n        await this.initialize();\n\n        const stmt = this.db.prepare(`\n            DELETE FROM search_index\n            WHERE timestamp < datetime('now', '-${daysOld} days')\n        `);\n        stmt.run();\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 获取索引统计信息\n     */\n    async getStats() {\n        await this.initialize();\n\n        const stmt = this.db.prepare(`\n            SELECT\n                COUNT(*) as total_entries,\n                COUNT(DISTINCT conversation_id) as total_conversations,\n                MIN(timestamp) as oldest_entry,\n                MAX(timestamp) as newest_entry\n            FROM search_index\n        `);\n\n        return stmt.get();\n    }\n\n    close() {\n        if (this.db) {\n            this.db.close();\n        }\n    }\n}"
}
```

  "contentsAfterEdit": "/**\r\n * 搜索索引管理器\r\n * 负责建立和维护聊天记录的搜索索引\r\n */\r\n\r\nimport * as Database from 'better-sqlite3';\r\nimport * as path from 'path';\r\nimport * as fs from 'fs';\r\nimport { Message } from './types';\r\n\r\nexport interface SearchResult {\r\n    conversationId: string;\r\n    messageId: string;\r\n    timestamp: string;\r\n    content: string;\r\n    type: 'user' | 'assistant' | 'tool';\r\n    score: number;\r\n    highlights?: string[]; // 匹配的关键词\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport interface SearchIndexEntry {\r\n    id: string;\r\n    conversationId: string;\r\n    messageId: string;\r\n    content: string;\r\n    timestamp: string;\r\n    type: 'user' | 'assistant' | 'tool';\r\n    tokens: string[]; // 分词后的关键词\r\n    metadata: {\r\n        modelName?: string;\r\n        toolName?: string;\r\n        filePaths?: string[];\r\n        codeSnippets?: string[];\r\n    };\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport class SearchIndexManager {\r\n    private db: Database.Database;\r\n    private initialized: boolean = false;\r\n\r\n    constructor(private workspaceRoot: string) {\r\n        const indexPath = path.join(workspaceRoot, '.llm-chat-history', 'search-index.db');\r\n        this.ensureIndexDirectory(indexPath);\r\n        this.db = new Database(indexPath);\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    private ensureIndexDirectory(indexPath: string) {\r\n        const dir = path.dirname(indexPath);\r\n        if (!fs.existsSync(dir)) {\r\n            fs.mkdirSync(dir, { recursive: true });\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    async initialize() {\r\n        if (this.initialized) return;\r\n\r\n        // 创建搜索索引表\r\n        this.db.exec(`\r\n            CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS search_index (\r\n                id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,\r\n                conversation_id TEXT NOT NULL,\r\n                message_id TEXT NOT NULL,\r\n                content TEXT NOT NULL,\r\n                timestamp TEXT NOT NULL,\r\n                type TEXT NOT NULL,\r\n                tokens TEXT NOT NULL, -- JSON array of tokens\r\n                metadata TEXT, -- JSON metadata\r\n                created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\r\n                updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP\r\n            );\r\n\r\n            CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_conversation_id ON search_index(conversation_id);\r\n            CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_timestamp ON search_index(timestamp);\r\n            CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_type ON search_index(type);\r\n            CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE IF NOT EXISTS fts_content USING fts5(\r\n                content, content='search_index', content_rowid='rowid'\r\n            );\r\n\r\n            -- 创建更新触发器\r\n            CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS search_index_update_trigger\r\n            AFTER UPDATE ON search_index\r\n            BEGIN\r\n                UPDATE search_index SET updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = NEW.id;\r\n            END;\r\n        `);\r\n\r\n        this.initialized = true;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 为消息建立搜索索引\r\n     */\r\n    async indexMessage(conversationId: string, message: Message) {\r\n        await this.initialize();\r\n\r\n        const id = `${conversationId}_${message.id}`;\r\n        const tokens = this.tokenize(message.text);\r\n        const metadata = this.extractMetadata(message);\r\n\r\n        const insert = this.db.prepare(`\r\n            INSERT OR REPLACE INTO search_index\r\n            (id, conversation_id, message_id, content, timestamp, type, tokens, metadata)\r\n            VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)\r\n        `);\r\n\r\n        insert.run(\r\n            id,\r\n            conversationId,\r\n            message.id,\r\n            message.text,\r\n            message.timestamp,\r\n            message.type,\r\n            JSON.stringify(tokens),\r\n            JSON.stringify(metadata)\r\n        );\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 全文搜索\r\n     */\r\n    async search(query: string, options: {\r\n        limit?: number;\r\n        offset?: number;\r\n        conversationId?: string;\r\n        type?: 'user' | 'assistant' | 'tool';\r\n        startDate?: string;\r\n        endDate?: string;\r\n    } = {}): Promise<SearchResult[]> {\r\n        await this.initialize();\r\n\r\n        const { limit = 50, offset = 0, conversationId, type, startDate, endDate } = options;\r\n\r\n        let whereClause = '1=1';\r\n        const params: any[] = [];\r\n\r\n        if (conversationId) {\r\n            whereClause += ' AND conversation_id = ?';\r\n            params.push(conversationId);\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        if (type) {\r\n            whereClause += ' AND type = ?';\r\n            params.push(type);\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        if (startDate) {\r\n            whereClause += ' AND timestamp >= ?';\r\n            params.push(startDate);\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        if (endDate) {\r\n            whereClause += ' AND timestamp <= ?';\r\n            params.push(endDate);\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        // 使用FTS5进行全文搜索\r\n        const searchQuery = `\r\n            SELECT si.*, highlight(fts_content, 0, '<mark>', '</mark>') as highlighted\r\n            FROM search_index si\r\n            JOIN fts_content ON si.rowid = fts_content.rowid\r\n            WHERE fts_content MATCH ?\r\n            AND ${whereClause}\r\n            ORDER BY bm25(fts_content) * (1 + (julianday('now') - julianday(si.timestamp)) * 0.1)\r\n            LIMIT ? OFFSET ?\r\n        `;\r\n\r\n        const stmt = this.db.prepare(searchQuery);\r\n        const results = stmt.all(query, ...params, limit, offset);\r\n\r\n        return results.map(row => ({\r\n            conversationId: row.conversation_id,\r\n            messageId: row.message_id,\r\n            timestamp: row.timestamp,\r\n            content: row.content,\r\n            type: row.type,\r\n            score: 0, // 可以基于BM25分数计算\r\n            highlights: this.extractHighlights(row.highlighted || row.content, query)\r\n        }));\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 分词处理\r\n     */\r\n    private tokenize(text: string): string[] {\r\n        // 简单的分词逻辑，可以扩展为更复杂的中文分词\r\n        return text\r\n            .toLowerCase()\r\n            .replace(/[^\\w\\u4e00-\\u9fff]+/g, ' ')\r\n            .split(/\\s+/)\r\n            .filter(token => token.length > 1)\r\n            .map(token => token.replace(/[^\\w\\u4e00-\\u9fff]/g, ''));\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 提取元数据\r\n     */\r\n    private extractMetadata(message: Message): SearchIndexEntry['metadata'] {\r\n        const metadata: SearchIndexEntry['metadata'] = {};\r\n\r\n        if (message.modelName) {\r\n            metadata.modelName = message.modelName;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        // 提取工具调用信息\r\n        if (message.toolUses && message.toolUses.length > 0) {\r\n            metadata.toolName = message.toolUses[0].name;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        // 提取文件路径\r\n        if (message.context && typeof message.context === 'object') {\r\n            const context = message.context as any;\r\n            if (context.workspaceUris) {\r\n                metadata.filePaths = context.workspaceUris;\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        // 提取代码片段（简单的正则匹配）\r\n        const codeBlocks = message.text.match(/```[\\w]*\\n([\\s\\S]*?)```/g);\r\n        if (codeBlocks) {\r\n            metadata.codeSnippets = codeBlocks.map(block =>\r\n                block.replace(/```\\w*\\n?/, '').replace(/```$/, '')\r\n            );\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        return metadata;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 提取高亮关键词\r\n     */\r\n    private extractHighlights(content: string, query: string): string[] {\r\n        const queryWords = query.toLowerCase().split(/\\s+/);\r\n        const highlights: string[] = [];\r\n\r\n        queryWords.forEach(word => {\r\n            if (content.toLowerCase().includes(word)) {\r\n                highlights.push(word);\r\n            }\r\n        });\r\n\r\n        return highlights;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 删除对话的索引\r\n     */\r\n    async removeConversationIndex(conversationId: string) {\r\n        await this.initialize();\r\n\r\n        const stmt = this.db.prepare('DELETE FROM search_index WHERE conversation_id = ?');\r\n        stmt.run(conversationId);\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 清理过期索引（可选）\r\n     */\r\n    async cleanupOldIndexes(daysOld: number = 90) {\r\n        await this.initialize();\r\n\r\n        const stmt = this.db.prepare(`\r\n            DELETE FROM search_index\r\n            WHERE timestamp < datetime('now', '-${daysOld} days')\r\n        `);\r\n        stmt.run();\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 获取索引统计信息\r\n     */\r\n    async getStats() {\r\n        await this.initialize();\r\n\r\n        const stmt = this.db.prepare(`\r\n            SELECT\r\n                COUNT(*) as total_entries,\r\n                COUNT(DISTINCT conversation_id) as total_conversations,\r\n                MIN(timestamp) as oldest_entry,\r\n                MAX(timestamp) as newest_entry\r\n            FROM search_index\r\n        `);\r\n\r\n        return stmt.get();\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    close() {\r\n        if (this.db) {\r\n            this.db.close();\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n"
}

HistorySaver {\n    private historyDir: string;\n    \n    constructor(workspaceRoot: string, outputDir: string = '.llm-chat-history/history') {\n        this.historyDir = path.join(workspaceRoot,   "new_string": "    /**\n     * 保存对话到文件并建立搜索索引\n     */\n    async save(composer: ComposerData, markdown: string, messages?: Message[]): Promise<string> {\n        // 确保目录存在\n        await fs.mkdir(this.historyDir, { recursive: true });\n\n        // 生成文件名\n        const filename = this.generateFilename(composer);\n        const filepath = path.join(this.historyDir, filename);\n\n        // 检查是否需要更新\n        const shouldSave = await this.shouldSave(filepath, markdown);\n\n        if (shouldSave) {\n            await fs.writeFile(filepath, markdown, 'utf-8');\n\n            // 如果提供了消息数据，建立搜索索引\n            if (messages) {\n                await this.indexConversation(composer.composerId, messages);\n            }\n        }\n\n        return filepath;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 为对话建立搜索索引\n     */\n    private async indexConversation(conversationId: string, messages: Message[]) {\n        try {\n            await this.searchIndex.initialize();\n\n            // 先删除旧的索引\n            await this.searchIndex.removeConversationIndex(conversationId);\n\n            // 为每条消息建立索引\n            for (const message of messages) {\n                await this.searchIndex.indexMessage(conversationId, message);\n            }\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error('Failed to index conversation:', error);\n            // 不抛出错误，避免影响主功能\n        }\n    }"
}

{
  "file_path": "media/search.js",
  "old_string": "",
  "new_string": "// LLM Chat History Search JavaScript\n\n(function() {\n    const vscode = acquireVsCodeApi();\n\n    // DOM elements\n    const searchInput = document.getElementById('search-input');\n    const searchButton = document.getElementById('search-button');\n    const typeFilter = document.getElementById('type-filter');\n    const startDate = document.getElementById('start-date');\n    const endDate = document.getElementById('end-date');\n    const resultsContainer = document.getElementById('results');\n    const loading = document.getElementById('loading');\n    const statsElement = document.getElementById('stats');\n\n    let currentQuery = '';\n    let currentOptions = {};\n\n    // Initialize\n    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {\n        setupEventListeners();\n        loadStats();\n    });\n\n    function setupEventListeners() {\n        // Search input\n        searchInput.addEventListener('keypress', function(e) {\n            if (e.key === 'Enter') {\n                performSearch();\n            }\n        });\n\n        searchButton.addEventListener('click', performSearch);\n\n        // Filters\n        typeFilter.addEventListener('change', function() {\n            currentOptions.type = this.value || undefined;\n            if (currentQuery) performSearch();\n        });\n\n        startDate.addEventListener('change', function() {\n            currentOptions.startDate = this.value || undefined;\n            if (currentQuery) performSearch();\n        });\n\n        endDate.addEventListener('change', function() {\n            currentOptions.endDate = this.value || undefined;\n            if (currentQuery) performSearch();\n        });\n    }\n\n    function performSearch() {\n        const query = searchInput.value.trim();\n        if (!query) return;\n\n        currentQuery = query;\n        showLoading();\n\n        vscode.postMessage({\n            type: 'search',\n            query: query,\n            options: currentOptions\n        });\n    }\n\n    function showLoading() {\n        loading.style.display = 'flex';\n        resultsContainer.innerHTML = '';\n    }\n\n    function hideLoading() {\n        loading.style.display = 'none';\n    }\n\n    // Handle messages from extension\n    window.addEventListener('message', event => {\n        const message = event.data;\n\n        switch (message.type) {\n            case 'searchResults':\n                hideLoading();\n                displayResults(message.results, message.query);\n                break;\n            case 'searchError':\n                hideLoading();\n                displayError(message.error);\n                break;\n            case 'stats':\n                displayStats(message.stats);\n                break;\n        }\n    });\n\n    function displayResults(results, query) {\n        if (results.length === 0) {\n            resultsContainer.innerHTML = `\n                <div class=\"empty-state\">\n                    <p>🔍 No results found for \"${query}\"</p>\n                    <p>Try different keywords or adjust filters</p>\n                </div>\n            `;\n            return;\n        }\n\n        const html = results.map(result => `\n            <div class=\"search-result\" data-conversation-id=\"${result.conversationId}\" data-message-id=\"${result.messageId}\">\n                <div class=\"result-header\">\n                    <span class=\"result-type ${result.type}\">${result.type}</span>\n                    <span class=\"result-timestamp\">${formatTimestamp(result.timestamp)}</span>\n                </div>\n                <div class=\"result-content\">\n                    ${highlightContent(result.content, query)}\n                </div>\n                ${result.highlights && result.highlights.length > 0 ? `\n                    <div class=\"result-highlights\">\n                        ${result.highlights.map(tag => `<span class=\"highlight-tag\">${tag}</span>`).join('')}\n                    </div>\n                ` : ''}\n            </div>\n        `).join('');\n\n        resultsContainer.innerHTML = html;\n\n        // Add click handlers\n        document.querySelectorAll('.search-result').forEach(result => {\n            result.addEventListener('click', function() {\n                const conversationId = this.dataset.conversationId;\n                const messageId = this.dataset.messageId;\n                vscode.postMessage({\n                    type: 'openResult',\n                    result: results.find(r => r.conversationId === conversationId && r.messageId === messageId)\n                });\n            });\n        });\n    }\n\n    function highlightContent(content, query) {\n        if (!query) return content;\n\n        const words = query.toLowerCase().split(/\\s+/);\n        let highlighted = content;\n\n        words.forEach(word => {\n            const regex = new RegExp(`(${escapeRegExp(word)})`, 'gi');\n            highlighted = highlighted.replace(regex, '<mark>$1</mark>');\n        });\n\n        return highlighted;\n    }\n\n    function escapeRegExp(string) {\n        return string.replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\\]\\\\]/g, '\\\\$&');\n    }\n\n    function formatTimestamp(timestamp) {\n        const date = new Date(timestamp);\n        const now = new Date();\n        const diffMs = now - date;\n        const diffDays = Math.floor(diffMs / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));\n\n        if (diffDays === 0) {\n            return date.toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' });\n        } else if (diffDays === 1) {\n            return 'Yesterday';\n        } else if (diffDays < 7) {\n            return `${diffDays} days ago`;\n        } else {\n            return date.toLocaleDateString();\n        }\n    }\n\n    function displayError(error) {\n        resultsContainer.innerHTML = `\n            <div class=\"error-message\">\n                <p>❌ Search failed: ${error}</p>\n            </div>\n        `;\n    }\n\n    function displayStats(stats) {\n        if (stats) {\n            statsElement.innerHTML = `\n                📊 ${stats.total_entries} entries in ${stats.total_conversations} conversations\n            `;\n        }\n    }\n\n    function loadStats() {\n        vscode.postMessage({ type: 'getStats' });\n    }\n})();"
}

  "contentsAfterEdit": "// LLM Chat History Search JavaScript\r\n\r\n(function() {\r\n    const vscode = acquireVsCodeApi();\r\n\r\n    // DOM elements\r\n    const searchInput = document.getElementById('search-input');\r\n    const searchButton = document.getElementById('search-button');\r\n    const typeFilter = document.getElementById('type-filter');\r\n    const startDate = document.getElementById('start-date');\r\n    const endDate = document.getElementById('end-date');\r\n    const resultsContainer = document.getElementById('results');\r\n    const loading = document.getElementById('loading');\r\n    const statsElement = document.getElementById('stats');\r\n\r\n    let currentQuery = '';\r\n    let currentOptions = {};\r\n\r\n    // Initialize\r\n    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {\r\n        setupEventListeners();\r\n        loadStats();\r\n    });\r\n\r\n    function setupEventListeners() {\r\n        // Search input\r\n        searchInput.addEventListener('keypress', function(e) {\r\n            if (e.key === 'Enter') {\r\n                performSearch();\r\n            }\r\n        });\r\n\r\n        searchButton.addEventListener('click', performSearch);\r\n\r\n        // Filters\r\n        typeFilter.addEventListener('change', function() {\r\n            currentOptions.type = this.value || undefined;\r\n            if (currentQuery) performSearch();\r\n        });\r\n\r\n        startDate.addEventListener('change', function() {\r\n            currentOptions.startDate = this.value || undefined;\r\n            if (currentQuery) performSearch();\r\n        });\r\n\r\n        endDate.addEventListener('change', function() {\r\n            currentOptions.endDate = this.value || undefined;\r\n            if (currentQuery) performSearch();\r\n        });\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    function performSearch() {\r\n        const query = searchInput.value.trim();\r\n        if (!query) return;\r\n\r\n        currentQuery = query;\r\n        showLoading();\r\n\r\n        vscode.postMessage({\r\n            type: 'search',\r\n            query: query,\r\n            options: currentOptions\r\n        });\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    function showLoading() {\r\n        loading.style.display = 'flex';\r\n        resultsContainer.innerHTML = '';\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    function hideLoading() {\r\n        loading.style.display = 'none';\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    // Handle messages from extension\r\n    window.addEventListener('message', event => {\r\n        const message = event.data;\r\n\r\n        switch (message.type) {\r\n            case 'searchResults':\r\n                hideLoading();\r\n                displayResults(message.results, message.query);\r\n                break;\r\n            case 'searchError':\r\n                hideLoading();\r\n                displayError(message.error);\r\n                break;\r\n            case 'stats':\r\n                displayStats(message.stats);\r\n                break;\r\n        }\r\n    });\r\n\r\n    function displayResults(results, query) {\r\n        if (results.length === 0) {\r\n            resultsContainer.innerHTML = `\r\n                <div class=\"empty-state\">\r\n                    <p>🔍 No results found for \"${query}\"</p>\r\n                    <p>Try different keywords or adjust filters</p>\r\n                </div>\r\n            `;\r\n            return;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        const html = results.map(result => `\r\n            <div class=\"search-result\" data-conversation-id=\"${result.conversationId}\" data-message-id=\"${result.messageId}\">\r\n                <div class=\"result-header\">\r\n                    <span class=\"result-type ${result.type}\">${result.type}</span>\r\n                    <span class=\"result-timestamp\">${formatTimestamp(result.timestamp)}</span>\r\n                </div>\r\n                <div class=\"result-content\">\r\n                    ${highlightContent(result.content, query)}\r\n                </div>\r\n                ${result.highlights && result.highlights.length > 0 ? `\r\n                    <div class=\"result-highlights\">\r\n                        ${result.highlights.map(tag => `<span class=\"highlight-tag\">${tag}</span>`).join('')}\r\n                    </div>\r\n                ` : ''}\r\n            </div>\r\n        `).join('');\r\n\r\n        resultsContainer.innerHTML = html;\r\n\r\n        // Add click handlers\r\n        document.querySelectorAll('.search-result').forEach(result => {\r\n            result.addEventListener('click', function() {\r\n                const conversationId = this.dataset.conversationId;\r\n                const messageId = this.dataset.messageId;\r\n                vscode.postMessage({\r\n                    type: 'openResult',\r\n                    result: results.find(r => r.conversationId === conversationId && r.messageId === messageId)\r\n                });\r\n            });\r\n        });\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    function highlightContent(content, query) {\r\n        if (!query) return content;\r\n\r\n        const words = query.toLowerCase().split(/\\s+/);\r\n        let highlighted = content;\r\n\r\n        words.forEach(word => {\r\n            const regex = new RegExp(`(${escapeRegExp(word)})`, 'gi');\r\n            highlighted = highlighted.replace(regex, '<mark>$1</mark>');\r\n        });\r\n\r\n        return highlighted;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    function escapeRegExp(string) {\r\n        return string.replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\\]\\\\]/g, '\\\\$&');\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    function formatTimestamp(timestamp) {\r\n        const date = new Date(timestamp);\r\n        const now = new Date();\r\n        const diffMs = now - date;\r\n        const diffDays = Math.floor(diffMs / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));\r\n\r\n        if (diffDays === 0) {\r\n            return date.toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' });\r\n        } else if (diffDays === 1) {\r\n            return 'Yesterday';\r\n        } else if (diffDays < 7) {\r\n            return `${diffDays} days ago`;\r\n        } else {\r\n            return date.toLocaleDateString();\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    function displayError(error) {\r\n        resultsContainer.innerHTML = `\r\n            <div class=\"error-message\">\r\n                <p>❌ Search failed: ${error}</p>\r\n            </div>\r\n        `;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    function displayStats(stats) {\r\n        if (stats) {\r\n            statsElement.innerHTML = `\r\n                📊 ${stats.total_entries} entries in ${stats.total_conversations} conversations\r\n            `;\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    function loadStats() {\r\n        vscode.postMessage({ type: 'getStats' });\r\n    }\r\n})();\r\n"
}

watcher');\n        const codegeexWatcher = new CodeGeeXWatcher(codegeexStoragePath, workspaceRoot, localeSetting);\n        codegeexWatcher.start();\n        watchers.push(codegeexWatcher);\n    } else {\n        console.log('CodeGeeX storage not found:', codegeexStoragePath);\n    }\n\n    // 尝试启动 Kilo 监听\n    const kiloStoragePath = getKiloStoragePath();\n    if (fs.existsSync(kiloStoragePath)) {\n        console.log('Kilo storage found, starting Kilo watcher');\n        const kiloWatcher = new KiloWatcher(kiloStoragePath, workspaceRoot, localeSetting);\n        kiloWatcher.start();\n        watchers.push(kiloWatcher);\n    } else {\n        console.log('Kilo storage not found:', kiloStoragePath);\n    }\n    \n    // 如果没有找到任何聊天历史\n    if (watchers.length === 0) {\n        console.warn('No chat history sources found (Cursor, Cline, Codex, Blackbox AI, CodeGeeX, or Kilo)');\n        vscode.window.showWarningMessage(\n            'LLM Chat History: No supported AI plugins found. Please install and use Cursor, Cline, GitHub Copilot Chat, Blackbox AI, CodeGeeX, or Kilo.'\n        );\n        return;\n    }\n    \n    // 注册搜索WebView\n    const searchProvider = new SearchWebviewProvider(context.extensionUri, workspaceRoot);\n    context.subscriptions.push(\n        vscode.window.registerWebviewViewProvider(SearchWebviewProvider.viewType, searchProvider)\n    );\n\n    // 注册命令：手动保存\n    const saveCommand = vscode.commands.registerCommand(\n        'chatHistory.saveNow',\n        () => {\n            for (const watcher of watchers) {\n                watcher.syncNow();\n            }\n            vscode.window.showInformationMessage(t('info.saved'));\n        }\n    );\n\n    // 注册搜索命令\n    const searchCommand = vscode.commands.registerCommand(\n        'chatHistory.search',\n        () => {\n            vscode.commands.executeCommand('workbench.view.extension.llmChatHistory');\n        }\n    );\n\n    context.subscriptions.push(saveCommand, searchCommand, {\n        dispose: () => {\n            for (const watcher of watchers) {\n                watcher.stop();\n            }\n        }\n    });\n    \n    console.log(`LLM Chat History Extension ready (${watchers.length} source(s))`);\n}\n\n/**\n * 扩展停用时调用\n */\nexport function deactivate() {\n    console.log('LLM Chat History Extension deactivated');\n}\n\n/**\n * 获取 Cursor 数据库路径\n */\nfunction getCursorDatabasePath(): string {\n    const platform = process.platform;\n    const homeDir = process.env.HOME || process.env.USERPROFILE || '';\n    \n    if (platform === 'win32') {\n        return path.join(\n            homeDir,\n            'AppData/Roaming/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb'\n        );\n    } else if (platform === 'darwin') {\n        return path.join(\n            homeDir,\n            'Library/Application Support/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb'\n        );\n    } else {\n        // Linux\n        return path.join(\n            homeDir,\n            '.config/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb'\n        );\n    }\n}\n\n\n"

  "new_string": "/**\n * 笔记管理器\n * 负责管理聊天记录的笔记标注功能\n */\n\nimport * as Database from 'better-sqlite3';\nimport * as path from 'path';\nimport * as fs from 'fs';\n\nexport interface NoteAnnotation {\n    id: string;\n    conversationId: string;\n    messageId: string;\n    selectedText: string;\n    startOffset: number; // 在消息中的起始位置\n    endOffset: number;   // 在消息中的结束位置\n    note: string;        // 用户添加的笔记内容\n    category?: string;   // AI自动分类的类别\n    tags: string[];      // 用户或AI添加的标签\n    intent?: string;     // AI识别的用户意图\n    importance: 'low' | 'medium' | 'high'; // 重要性级别\n    createdAt: string;\n    updatedAt: string;\n    aiAnalysis?: {\n        intent: string;\n        category: string;\n        tags: string[];\n        summary: string;\n        confidence: number;\n    };\n}\n\nexport interface NoteStats {\n    totalNotes: number;\n    categories: { [key: string]: number };\n    tags: { [key: string]: number };\n    importance: { [key: string]: number };\n}\n\nexport class NotesManager {\n    private db: Database.Database;\n    private initialized: boolean = false;\n\n    constructor(private workspaceRoot: string) {\n        const notesPath = path.join(workspaceRoot, '.llm-chat-history', 'notes.db');\n        this.ensureNotesDirectory(notesPath);\n        this.db = new Database(notesPath);\n    }\n\n    private ensureNotesDirectory(notesPath: string) {\n        const dir = path.dirname(notesPath);\n        if (!fs.existsSync(dir)) {\n            fs.mkdirSync(dir, { recursive: true });\n        }\n    }\n\n    async initialize() {\n        if (this.initialized) return;\n\n        this.db.exec(`\n            CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS notes (\n                id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,\n                conversation_id TEXT NOT NULL,\n                message_id TEXT NOT NULL,\n                selected_text TEXT NOT NULL,\n                start_offset INTEGER NOT NULL,\n                end_offset INTEGER NOT NULL,\n                note TEXT NOT NULL,\n                category TEXT,\n                tags TEXT, -- JSON array\n                intent TEXT,\n                importance TEXT DEFAULT 'medium',\n                created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n                updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n                ai_analysis TEXT -- JSON object\n            );\n\n            CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_conversation_id ON notes(conversation_id);\n            CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_message_id ON notes(message_id);\n            CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_category ON notes(category);\n            CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_importance ON notes(importance);\n\n            -- 创建更新触发器\n            CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS notes_update_trigger\n            AFTER UPDATE ON notes\n            BEGIN\n                UPDATE notes SET updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = NEW.id;\n            END;\n        `);\n\n        this.initialized = true;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 创建新笔记\n     */\n    async createNote(annotation: Omit<NoteAnnotation, 'id' | 'createdAt' | 'updatedAt'>): Promise<string> {\n        await this.initialize();\n\n        const id = `note_${Date.now()}_${Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9)}`;\n\n        const insert = this.db.prepare(`\n            INSERT INTO notes\n            (id, conversation_id, message_id, selected_text, start_offset, end_offset,\n             note, category, tags, intent, importance, ai_analysis)\n            VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)\n        `);\n\n        insert.run(\n            id,\n            annotation.conversationId,\n            annotation.messageId,\n            annotation.selectedText,\n            annotation.startOffset,\n            annotation.endOffset,\n            annotation.note,\n            annotation.category || null,\n            JSON.stringify(annotation.tags),\n            annotation.intent || null,\n            annotation.importance,\n            annotation.aiAnalysis ? JSON.stringify(annotation.aiAnalysis) : null\n        );\n\n        return id;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 更新笔记\n     */\n    async updateNote(id: string, updates: Partial<NoteAnnotation>): Promise<void> {\n        await this.initialize();\n\n        const fields: string[] = [];\n        const values: any[] = [];\n\n        if (updates.note !== undefined) {\n            fields.push('note = ?');\n            values.push(updates.note);\n        }\n        if (updates.category !== undefined) {\n            fields.push('category = ?');\n            values.push(updates.category);\n        }\n        if (updates.tags !== undefined) {\n            fields.push('tags = ?');\n            values.push(JSON.stringify(updates.tags));\n        }\n        if (updates.intent !== undefined) {\n            fields.push('intent = ?');\n            values.push(updates.intent);\n        }\n        if (updates.importance !== undefined) {\n            fields.push('importance = ?');\n            values.push(updates.importance);\n        }\n        if (updates.aiAnalysis !== undefined) {\n            fields.push('ai_analysis = ?');\n            values.push(JSON.stringify(updates.aiAnalysis));\n        }\n\n        if (fields.length === 0) return;\n\n        const stmt = this.db.prepare(`\n            UPDATE notes SET ${fields.join(', ')} WHERE id = ?\n        `);\n        values.push(id);\n        stmt.run(...values);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 删除笔记\n     */\n    async deleteNote(id: string): Promise<void> {\n        await this.initialize();\n\n        const stmt = this.db.prepare('DELETE FROM notes WHERE id = ?');\n        stmt.run(id);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 获取指定消息的所有笔记\n     */\n    async getNotesForMessage(conversationId: string, messageId: string): Promise<NoteAnnotation[]> {\n        await this.initialize();\n\n        const stmt = this.db.prepare(`\n            SELECT * FROM notes\n            WHERE conversation_id = ? AND message_id = ?\n            ORDER BY created_at DESC\n        `);\n\n        const rows = stmt.all(conversationId, messageId);\n        return rows.map(this.mapRowToNote);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 获取所有笔记（支持过滤和分页）\n     */\n    async getAllNotes(options: {\n        category?: string;\n        tags?: string[];\n        importance?: string;\n        limit?: number;\n        offset?: number;\n        search?: string;\n    } = {}): Promise<NoteAnnotation[]> {\n        await this.initialize();\n\n        let whereClause = '1=1';\n        const params: any[] = [];\n\n        if (options.category) {\n            whereClause += ' AND category = ?';\n            params.push(options.category);\n        }\n\n        if (options.importance) {\n            whereClause += ' AND importance = ?';\n            params.push(options.importance);\n        }\n\n        if (options.tags && options.tags.length > 0) {\n            const tagConditions = options.tags.map(() => 'tags LIKE ?').join(' OR ');\n            whereClause += ` AND (${tagConditions})`;\n            options.tags.forEach(tag => params.push(`%${tag}%`));\n        }\n\n        if (options.search) {\n            whereClause += ' AND (note LIKE ? OR selected_text LIKE ?)';\n            params.push(`%${options.search}%`, `%${options.search}%`);\n        }\n\n        const stmt = this.db.prepare(`\n            SELECT * FROM notes\n            WHERE ${whereClause}\n            ORDER BY updated_at DESC\n            LIMIT ? OFFSET ?\n        `);\n\n        params.push(options.limit || 50, options.offset || 0);\n        const rows = stmt.all(...params);\n        return rows.map(this.mapRowToNote);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 获取笔记统计信息\n     */\n    async getStats(): Promise<NoteStats> {\n        await this.initialize();\n\n        const totalStmt = this.db.prepare('SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM notes');\n        const total = totalStmt.get().count;\n\n        const categoryStmt = this.db.prepare(`\n            SELECT category, COUNT(*) as count\n            FROM notes\n            WHERE category IS NOT NULL\n            GROUP BY category\n        `);\n        const categories = categoryStmt.all().reduce((acc, row) => {\n            acc[row.category] = row.count;\n            return acc;\n        }, {});\n\n        const tagStmt = this.db.prepare(`\n            SELECT json_each.value as tag, COUNT(*) as count\n            FROM notes, json_each(tags)\n            GROUP BY tag\n        `);\n        const tags = tagStmt.all().reduce((acc, row) => {\n            acc[row.tag] = row.count;\n            return acc;\n        }, {});\n\n        const importanceStmt = this.db.prepare(`\n            SELECT importance, COUNT(*) as count\n            FROM notes\n            GROUP BY importance\n        `);\n        const importance = importanceStmt.all().reduce((acc, row) => {\n            acc[row.importance] = row.count;\n            return acc;\n        }, {});\n\n        return {\n            totalNotes: total,\n            categories,\n            tags,\n            importance\n        };\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 获取唯一类别列表\n     */\n    async getCategories(): Promise<string[]> {\n        await this.initialize();\n\n        const stmt = this.db.prepare(`\n            SELECT DISTINCT category\n            FROM notes\n            WHERE category IS NOT NULL\n            ORDER BY category\n        `);\n\n        return stmt.all().map(row => row.category);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 获取唯一标签列表\n     */\n    async getTags(): Promise<string[]> {\n        await this.initialize();\n\n        const stmt = this.db.prepare(`\n            SELECT DISTINCT json_each.value as tag\n            FROM notes, json_each(tags)\n            ORDER BY tag\n        `);\n\n        return stmt.all().map(row => row.tag);\n    }\n\n    private mapRowToNote(row: any): NoteAnnotation {\n        return {\n            id: row.id,\n            conversationId: row.conversation_id,\n            messageId: row.message_id,\n            selectedText: row.selected_text,\n            startOffset: row.start_offset,\n            endOffset: row.end_offset,\n            note: row.note,\n            category: row.category,\n            tags: JSON.parse(row.tags || '[]'),\n            intent: JSON.parse(row.ai_analysis) : undefined\n        };\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 清理过期笔记（可选）\n     */\n    async cleanupOldNotes(daysOld: number = 365): Promise<void> {\n        await this.initialize();\n\n        const stmt = this.db.prepare(`\n            DELETE FROM notes\n            WHERE updated_at < datetime('now', '-${daysOld} days')\n        `);\n        stmt.run();\n    }\n\n    close() {\n        if (this.db) {\n            this.db.close();\n        }\n    }\n}"

NOT NULL\r\n            ORDER BY category\r\n        `);\r\n\r\n        return stmt.all().map(row => row.category);\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 获取唯一标签列表\r\n     */\r\n    async getTags(): Promise<string[]> {\r\n        await this.initialize();\r\n\r\n        const stmt = this.db.prepare(`\r\n            SELECT DISTINCT json_each.value as tag\r\n            FROM notes, json_each(tags)\r\n            ORDER BY tag\r\n        `);\r\n\r\n        return stmt.all().map(row => row.tag);\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    private mapRowToNote(row: any): NoteAnnotation {\r\n        return {\r\n            id: row.id,\r\n            conversationId: row.conversation_id,\r\n            messageId: row.message_id,\r\n            selectedText: row.selected_text,\r\n            startOffset: row.start_offset,\r\n            endOffset: row.end_offset,\r\n            note: row.note,\r\n            category: row.category,\r\n            tags: JSON.parse(row.tags || '[]'),\r\n            intent: row.intent,\r\n            importance: row.importance,\r\n            createdAt: row.created_at,\r\n            updatedAt: row.updated_at,\r\n            aiAnalysis: row.ai_analysis ? JSON.parse(row.ai_analysis) : undefined\r\n        };\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 清理过期笔记（可选）\r\n     */\r\n    async cleanupOldNotes(daysOld: number = 365): Promise<void> {\r\n        await this.initialize();\r\n\r\n        const stmt = this.db.prepare(`\r\n            DELETE FROM notes\r\n            WHERE updated_at < datetime('now', '-${daysOld} days')\r\n        `);\r\n        stmt.run();\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    close() {\r\n        if (this.db) {\r\n            this.db.close();\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n"
}

     // 内容分类\n    tags: string[];        // 相关标签\n    summary: string;       // 内容摘要\n    confidence: number;    // 置信度 (0-1)\n    reasoning?: string;    // 分析推理过程\n}\n\nexport interface AIAnalysisRequest {\n    selectedText: string;\n    contextBefore?: string;    // 标注文本前的内容\n    contextAfter?: string;     // 标注文本后的内容\n    messageType: 'user' | 'assistant';\n    conversationTitle?: string;\n    existingCategories?: string[]; // 已存在的类别列表\n    existingTags?: string[];      // 已存在的标签列表\n}\n\nexport class AIAnalyzer {\n    private static readonly ANALYSIS_PROMPT = `\n请分析用户标注的聊天记录文本片段，并提供以下信息：\n\n标注文本：{selectedText}\n\n上下文信息：\n- 前文：{contextBefore}\n- 后文：{contextAfter}\n- 消息类型：{messageType}\n- 对话标题：{conversationTitle}\n\n现有类别：{existingCategories}\n现有标签：{existingTags}\n\n请以JSON格式返回分析结果：\n\n{\n    \"intent\": \"用户意图的简短描述\",\n    \"category\": \"最合适的分类（可从现有类别中选择，或创建新类别）\",\n    \"tags\": [\"相关标签数组\", \"最多5个\"],\n    \"summary\": \"标注内容的简要摘要（20字以内）\",\n    \"confidence\": 0.85,\n    \"reasoning\": \"分析推理过程的简短说明\"\n}\n\n意图分类参考：\n- 学习/研究：寻求知识、理解概念\n- 问题解决：调试、修复错误\n- 功能实现：实现新功能、特性\n- 配置/设置：环境配置、参数调整\n- 最佳实践：寻求最佳解决方案\n- 代码审查：检查和改进代码\n- 文档记录：记录重要信息\n- 创意想法：创新思路、想法记录\n\n分类参考：\n- 技术实现、算法逻辑、系统设计、性能优化、错误处理、安全性、测试、部署、维护\n\n请确保返回有效的JSON格式。`;\n\n    /**\n     * 分析标注文本内容\n     */\n    async analyzeAnnotation(request: AIAnalysisRequest): Promise<AIAnalysisResult> {\n        try {\n            // 构建分析提示\n            const prompt = this.buildAnalysisPrompt(request);\n\n            // 调用VS Code的AI功能（如果可用）\n            const result = await this.callAIAnalysis(prompt);\n\n            // 解析AI响应\n            return this.parseAIResponse(result);\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error('AI analysis failed:', error);\n            // 返回默认分析结果\n            return this.getFallbackAnalysis(request);\n        }\n    }\n\n    private buildAnalysisPrompt(request: AIAnalysisRequest): string {\n        return AIAnalyzer.ANALYSIS_PROMPT\n            .replace('{selectedText}', request.selectedText)\n            .replace('{contextBefore}', request.contextBefore || '无')\n            .replace('{contextAfter}', request.contextAfter || '无')\n            .replace('{messageType}', request.messageType === 'user' ? '用户消息' : 'AI回复')\n            .replace('{conversationTitle}', request.conversationTitle || '未命名对话')\n            .replace('{existingCategories}', request.existingCategories?.join('、') || '无')\n            .replace('{existingTags}', request.existingTags?.join('、') || '无');\n    }\n\n    private async callAIAnalysis(prompt: string): Promise<string> {\n        // 首先尝试使用VS Code内置的AI功能\n        if (vscode.lm && vscode.lm.selectChatModels) {\n            try {\n                const models = await vscode.lm.selectChatModels();\n                if (models.length > 0) {\n                    const model = models[0];\n                    const messages = [\n                        vscode.LanguageModelChatMessage.User(prompt)\n                    ];\n\n                    const response = await model.sendRequest(messages, {}, new vscode.CancellationTokenSource().token);\n\n                    let result = '';\n                    for await (const chunk of response.text) {\n                        result += chunk;\n                    }\n\n                    return result;\n                }\n            } catch (error) {\n                console.warn('VS Code LM API failed:', error);\n            }\n        }\n\n        // 如果没有可用的AI模型，返回默认分析\n        throw new Error('No AI model available');\n    }\n\n    private parseAIResponse(response: string): AIAnalysisResult {\n        try {\n            // 尝试提取JSON部分\n            const jsonMatch = response.match(/\\{[\\s\\S]*\\}/);\n            if (jsonMatch) {\n                const parsed = JSON.parse(jsonMatch[0]);\n                return {\n                    intent: parsed.intent || '未知意图',\n                    category: parsed.category || '未分类',\n                    tags: Array.isArray(parsed.tags) ? parsed.tags : [],\n                    summary: parsed.summary || '无摘要',\n                    confidence: typeof parsed.confidence === 'number' ? parsed.confidence : 0.5,\n                    reasoning: parsed.reasoning || ''\n                };\n            }\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.warn('Failed to parse AI response:', error);\n        }\n\n        // 如果解析失败，返回默认结果\n        return {\n            intent: '内容分析',\n            category: '未分类',\n            tags: [],\n            summary: 'AI分析失败',\n            confidence: 0.3,\n            reasoning: '无法解析AI响应'\n        };\n    }\n\n    private getFallbackAnalysis(request: AIAnalysisRequest): AIAnalysisResult {\n        // 基于关键词的简单分析\n        const text = request.selectedText.toLowerCase();\n\n        let intent = '内容记录';\n        let category = '未分类';\n        const tags: string[] = [];\n\n        // 简单的关键词匹配\n        if (text.includes('error') || text.includes('bug') || text.includes('fix')) {\n            intent = '问题解决';\n            category = '错误处理';\n            tags.push('调试', '修复');\n        } else if (text.includes('implement') || text.includes('create') || text.includes('build')) {\n            intent = '功能实现';\n            category = '技术实现';\n            tags.push('开发', '实现');\n        } else if (text.includes('config') || text.includes('setting') || text.includes('setup')) {\n            intent = '配置设置';\n            category = '配置管理';\n            tags.push('配置', '设置');\n        } else if (text.includes('learn') || text.includes('understand') || text.includes('explain')) {\n            intent = '学习研究';\n            category = '知识学习';\n            tags.push('学习', '理解');\n        }\n\n        // 提取可能的代码相关标签\n        if (text.includes('function') || text.includes('method')) tags.push('函数');\n        if (text.includes('class') || text.includes('object')) tags.push('类');\n        if (text.includes('api') || text.includes('endpoint')) tags.push('API');\n        if (text.includes('database') || text.includes('sql')) tags.push('数据库');\n        if (text.includes('ui') || text.includes('interface')) tags.push('界面');\n\n        return {\n            intent,\n            category,\n            tags: tags.slice(0, 5), // 最多5个标签\n            summary: request.selectedText.length > 50\n                ? request.selectedText.substring(0, 47) + '...'\n                : request.selectedText,\n            confidence: 0.6,\n            reasoning: '基于关键词的自动分析'\n        };\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 获取意图分类建议\n     */\n    static getIntentCategories(): string[] {\n        return [\n            '学习/研究',\n            '问题解决',\n            '功能实现',\n            '配置/设置',\n            '最佳实践',\n            '代码审查',\n            '文档记录',\n            '创意想法',\n            '其他'\n        ];\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 获取内容分类建议\n     */\n    static getContentCategories(): string[] {\n        return [\n            '技术实现',\n            '算法逻辑',\n            '系统设计',\n            '性能优化',\n            '错误处理',\n            '安全性',\n            '测试',\n            '部署',\n            '维护',\n            '其他'\n        ];\n    }\n}"
}

     // 已存在的标签列表\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport class AIAnalyzer {\r\n    private static readonly ANALYSIS_PROMPT = `\r\n请分析用户标注的聊天记录文本片段，并提供以下信息：\r\n\r\n标注文本：{selectedText}\r\n\r\n上下文信息：\r\n- 前文：{contextBefore}\r\n- 后文：{contextAfter}\r\n- 消息类型：{messageType}\r\n- 对话标题：{conversationTitle}\r\n\r\n现有类别：{existingCategories}\r\n现有标签：{existingTags}\r\n\r\n请以JSON格式返回分析结果：\r\n\r\n{\r\n    \"intent\": \"用户意图的简短描述\",\r\n    \"category\": \"最合适的分类（可从现有类别中选择，或创建新类别）\",\r\n    \"tags\": [\"相关标签数组\", \"最多5个\"],\r\n    \"summary\": \"标注内容的简要摘要（20字以内）\",\r\n    \"confidence\": 0.85,\r\n    \"reasoning\": \"分析推理过程的简短说明\"\r\n}\r\n\r\n意图分类参考：\r\n- 学习/研究：寻求知识、理解概念\r\n- 问题解决：调试、修复错误\r\n- 功能实现：实现新功能、特性\r\n- 配置/设置：环境配置、参数调整\r\n- 最佳实践：寻求最佳解决方案\r\n- 代码审查：检查和改进代码\r\n- 文档记录：记录重要信息\r\n- 创意想法：创新思路、想法记录\r\n\r\n分类参考：\r\n- 技术实现、算法逻辑、系统设计、性能优化、错误处理、安全性、测试、部署、维护\r\n\r\n请确保返回有效的JSON格式。`;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 分析标注文本内容\r\n     */\r\n    async analyzeAnnotation(request: AIAnalysisRequest): Promise<AIAnalysisResult> {\r\n        try {\r\n            // 构建分析提示\r\n            const prompt = this.buildAnalysisPrompt(request);\r\n\r\n            // 调用VS Code的AI功能（如果可用）\r\n            const result = await this.callAIAnalysis(prompt);\r\n\r\n            // 解析AI响应\r\n            return this.parseAIResponse(result);\r\n        } catch (error) {\r\n            console.error('AI analysis failed:', error);\r\n            // 返回默认分析结果\r\n            return this.getFallbackAnalysis(request);\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    private buildAnalysisPrompt(request: AIAnalysisRequest): string {\r\n        return AIAnalyzer.ANALYSIS_PROMPT\r\n            .replace('{selectedText}', request.selectedText)\r\n            .replace('{contextBefore}', request.contextBefore || '无')\r\n            .replace('{contextAfter}', request.contextAfter || '无')\r\n            .replace('{messageType}', request.messageType === 'user' ? '用户消息' : 'AI回复')\r\n            .replace('{conversationTitle}', request.conversationTitle || '未命名对话')\r\n            .replace('{existingCategories}', request.existingCategories?.join('、') || '无')\r\n            .replace('{existingTags}', request.existingTags?.join('、') || '无');\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    private async callAIAnalysis(prompt: string): Promise<string> {\r\n        // 首先尝试使用VS Code内置的AI功能\r\n        if (vscode.lm && vscode.lm.selectChatModels) {\r\n            try {\r\n                const models = await vscode.lm.selectChatModels();\r\n                if (models.length > 0) {\r\n                    const model = models[0];\r\n                    const messages = [\r\n                        vscode.LanguageModelChatMessage.User(prompt)\r\n                    ];\r\n\r\n                    const response = await model.sendRequest(messages, {}, new vscode.CancellationTokenSource().token);\r\n\r\n                    let result = '';\r\n                    for await (const chunk of response.text) {\r\n                        result += chunk;\r\n                    }\r\n\r\n                    return result;\r\n                }\r\n            } catch (error) {\r\n                console.warn('VS Code LM API failed:', error);\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        // 如果没有可用的AI模型，返回默认分析\r\n        throw new Error('No AI model available');\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    private parseAIResponse(response: string): AIAnalysisResult {\r\n        try {\r\n            // 尝试提取JSON部分\r\n            const jsonMatch = response.match(/\\{[\\s\\S]*\\}/);\r\n            if (jsonMatch) {\r\n                const parsed = JSON.parse(jsonMatch[0]);\r\n                return {\r\n                    intent: parsed.intent || '未知意图',\r\n                    category: parsed.category || '未分类',\r\n                    tags: Array.isArray(parsed.tags) ? parsed.tags : [],\r\n                    summary: parsed.summary || '无摘要',\r\n                    confidence: typeof parsed.confidence === 'number' ? parsed.confidence : 0.5,\r\n                    reasoning: parsed.reasoning || ''\r\n                };\r\n            }\r\n        } catch (error) {\r\n            console.warn('Failed to parse AI response:', error);\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        // 如果解析失败，返回默认结果\r\n        return {\r\n            intent: '内容分析',\r\n            category: '未分类',\r\n            tags: [],\r\n            summary: 'AI分析失败',\r\n            confidence: 0.3,\r\n            reasoning: '无法解析AI响应'\r\n        };\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    private getFallbackAnalysis(request: AIAnalysisRequest): AIAnalysisResult {\r\n        // 基于关键词的简单分析\r\n        const text = request.selectedText.toLowerCase();\r\n\r\n        let intent = '内容记录';\r\n        let category = '未分类';\r\n        const tags: string[] = [];\r\n\r\n        // 简单的关键词匹配\r\n        if (text.includes('error') || text.includes('bug') || text.includes('fix')) {\r\n            intent = '问题解决';\r\n            category = '错误处理';\r\n            tags.push('调试', '修复');\r\n        } else if (text.includes('implement') || text.includes('create') || text.includes('build')) {\r\n            intent = '功能实现';\r\n            category = '技术实现';\r\n            tags.push('开发', '实现');\r\n        } else if (text.includes('config') || text.includes('setting') || text.includes('setup')) {\r\n            intent = '配置设置';\r\n            category = '配置管理';\r\n            tags.push('配置', '设置');\r\n        } else if (text.includes('learn') || text.includes('understand') || text.includes('explain')) {\r\n            intent = '学习研究';\r\n            category = '知识学习';\r\n            tags.push('学习', '理解');\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        // 提取可能的代码相关标签\r\n        if (text.includes('function') || text.includes('method')) tags.push('函数');\r\n        if (text.includes('class') || text.includes('object')) tags.push('类');\r\n        if (text.includes('api') || text.includes('endpoint')) tags.push('API');\r\n        if (text.includes('database') || text.includes('sql')) tags.push('数据库');\r\n        if (text.includes('ui') || text.includes('interface')) tags.push('界面');\r\n\r\n        return {\r\n            intent,\r\n            category,\r\n            tags: tags.slice(0, 5), // 最多5个标签\r\n            summary: request.selectedText.length > 50\r\n                ? request.selectedText.substring(0, 47) + '...'\r\n                : request.selectedText,\r\n            confidence: 0.6,\r\n            reasoning: '基于关键词的自动分析'\r\n        };\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 获取意图分类建议\r\n     */\r\n    static getIntentCategories(): string[] {\r\n        return [\r\n            '学习/研究',\r\n            '问题解决',\r\n            '功能实现',\r\n            '配置/设置',\r\n            '最佳实践',\r\n            '代码审查',\r\n            '文档记录',\r\n            '创意想法',\r\n            '其他'\r\n        ];\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 获取内容分类建议\r\n     */\r\n    static getContentCategories(): string[] {\r\n        return [\r\n            '技术实现',\r\n            '算法逻辑',\r\n            '系统设计',\r\n            '性能优化',\r\n            '错误处理',\r\n            '安全性',\r\n            '测试',\r\n            '部署',\r\n            '维护',\r\n            '其他'\r\n        ];\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n"
}

private _view?: vscode.WebviewView;\n    private notesManager: NotesManager;\n    private aiAnalyzer: AIAnalyzer;\n\n    constructor(\n        private readonly _extensionUri: vscode.Uri,\n        workspaceRoot: string\n    ) {\n        this.notesManager = new NotesManager(workspaceRoot);\n        this.aiAnalyzer = new AIAnalyzer();\n    }\n\n    public resolveWebviewView(\n        webviewView: vscode.WebviewView,\n        context: vscode.WebviewViewResolveContext,\n        _token: vscode.CancellationTokenSource,\n    ) {\n        this._view = webviewView;\n\n await this.updateNote(message.id, message.updates);\n                        break;\n                    case 'deleteNote':\n                        await this.deleteNote(message.id);\n context.subscriptions\n        );\n    }\n\n    private async createNote(data: Omit<NoteAnnotation, 'id' | 'createdAt' | 'updatedAt'>) {\n        try {\n            const noteId = await vscode.window.showInformationMessage('笔记创建成功！');\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error('Failed to create note:', error);\n            vscode.window.showErrorMessage('创建笔记失败');\n        }\n    }\n\n    private async updateNote(id: string, updates: Partial<NoteAnnotation>) {\n        try {\n            await this.notesManager.updateNote(id, updates);\n            this._view?.webview.postMessage({\n                type: 'noteUpdated',\n                noteId: id\n            });\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error('Failed to update note:', 'annotation.css'));\n        const scriptUri = webview.asWebviewUri(vscode.Uri.joinPath(this._extensionUri, 'media', 'annotation.js'));\n\n        const nonce = getNonce();\n\n        return class=\"annotation-header\">\n                    <h3>📝 Chat Annotations</h3>\n                    <button id=\"create-note-btn\" class=\"primary-btn\">Create Note</button>\n                </div>\n\n                <div class=\"annotation-filters\">\n                    <input type=\"text\" id=\"search-notes\" placeholder=\"Search notes...\">\n                    <select id=\"category-filter\">\n Medium</label>\n                                    <label><input type=\"radio\" name=\"importance\" value=\"high\"> High</label>\n                                </div>\n                            </div>\n\n                            <div class=\"ai-analysis-section\">\n                                <button id=\"analyze-btn\" class=\"secondary-btn\">🤖 AI Analysis</button>\n                                <div id=\"analysis-result\" class=\"analysis-result\" style=\"display: none;\">\n                                    <div class=\"analysis-loading\" id=\"analysis-loading\">\n                                        Analyzing with AI...\n                                    </div>\n                                    <div class=\"analysis-content\" id=\"analysis-content\"></div>\n                                </div>\n                            </div>\n                        </div>\n                        <div class=\"modal-footer\">\n                            <button id=\"save-note-btn\" class=\"primary-btn\">Save Note</button>\n                            <button id=\"cancel-note-btn\" class=\"secondary-btn\">Cancel</button>\n                        </div>\n                    </div>\n                </div>\n            </div>\n\n            <script nonce=\"${nonce}\" src=\"${scriptUri}\"></script>\n        </body>\n        </html>`;\n    }\n}\n\nfunction getNonce() {\n    let text = '';\n    const possible = 'ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZabcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123456789';\n    for (let i = 0; i < 32; i++) {\n        text += possible.charAt(Math.floor(Math.random() * possible.length));\n    }\n    return text;\n}"
}

  "contentsAfterEdit": "/**\r\n * 标注WebView提供者\r\n * 提供文本标注和笔记创建界面\r\n */\r\n\r\nimport * as vscode from 'vscode';\r\nimport { NotesManager, NoteAnnotation } from './notes-manager';\r\nimport { 'llmChatHistory.annotation';\r\n    private _view?: vscode.WebviewView;\r\n    private notesManager: NotesManager;\r\n    private aiAnalyzer: AIAnalyzer;\r\n\r\n    constructor(\r\n        private readonly _extensionUri: vscode.Uri,\r\n        workspaceRoot: string\r\n    ) {\r\n        this.notesManager = new NotesManager(workspaceRoot);\r\n        this.aiAnalyzer = new AIAnalyzer();\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    public resolveWebviewView(\r\n        webviewView: vscode.WebviewView,\r\n        context: vscode.WebviewViewResolveContext,\r\n        _token: vscode.CancellationTokenSource,\r\n    ) {\r\n        this._view = webviewView;\r\n\r\n        webviewView.webview.options = {\r\n            enableScripts: true,\r\n            localResourceRoots: [this._extensionUri]\r\n        };\r\n\r\n        webviewView.webview.html = this._getHtmlForWebview(webviewView.webview);\r\n\r\n        // 处理来自WebView的消息\r\n        webviewView.webview.onDidReceiveMessage(\r\n            async (message) => {\r\n                switch (message.type) {\r\n                    case 'createNote':\r\n                        await this.createNote(message.data);\r\n                        break;\r\n                    case 'updateNote':\r\n                        await this.updateNote(message.id, message.updates);\r\n                        break;\r\n                    case 'deleteNote':\r\n                        await this.deleteNote(message.id);\r\n                        break;\r\n                    case 'getNotes':\r\n                        await this.getNotes(message.filters);\r\n                        break;\r\n                    case 'analyzeText':\r\n                        await this.analyzeText(message.request);\r\n                        break;\r\n                    case 'getCategories':\r\n                        await this.getCategories();\r\n                        break;\r\n                    case 'getTags':\r\n                        await this.getTags();\r\n                        break;\r\n                }\r\n            },\r\n            undefined,\r\n            context.subscriptions\r\n        );\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    private async createNote(data: Omit<NoteAnnotation, 'id' | 'createdAt' | 'updatedAt'>) {\r\n        try {\r\n            const noteId = await this.notesManager.createNote(data);\r\n            this._view?.webview.postMessage({\r\n                type: 'noteCreated',\r\n                noteId: noteId\r\n            });\r\n            vscode.window.showInformationMessage('笔记创建成功！');\r\n        } catch (error) {\r\n            console.error('Failed to create note:', error);\r\n            vscode.window.showErrorMessage('创建笔记失败');\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    private async updateNote(id: string, updates: Partial<NoteAnnotation>) {\r\n        try {\r\n            await this.notesManager.updateNote(id, updates);\r\n            this._view?.webview.postMessage({\r\n                type: 'noteUpdated',\r\n                noteId: id\r\n            });\r\n        } catch (error) {\r\n            console.error('Failed to update note:', error);\r\n            vscode.window.showErrorMessage('更新笔记失败');\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    private async deleteNote(id: string) {\r\n        try {\r\n            await this.notesManager.deleteNote(id);\r\n            this._view?.webview.postMessage({\r\n                type: 'noteDeleted',\r\n                noteId: id\r\n            });\r\n            vscode.window.showInformationMessage('笔记已删除');\r\n        } catch (error) {\r\n            console.error('Failed to delete note:', error);\r\n            vscode.window.showErrorMessage('删除笔记失败');\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    private async getNotes(filters: any) {\r\n        try {\r\n       currentConversationId = selection.conversationId || '';\n        currentMessageId = selection.messageId || '';\n        currentContext = selection.context || null;\n\n    };\n\n        vscode.postMessage({\n            type: 'analyzeText',\n            request: request\n        });\n    }\n\n    function displayAnalysisResult(analysis) {\n categories;\n\n        categoryFilter.innerHTML = '<option value=\"\">All Categories</option>';\n        categories.forEach(category => {\n            const option = displayNotes(notes) {\n        allNotes = notes;\n\n        if (notes.length === 0) {\n            notesList.innerHTML = `\n                <div class=\"empty-state\">\n                    <p>📝 No editNote(noteId);\n            });\n        });\n\n        document.querySelectorAll('.delete-btn').forEach(btn => {\n            btn.addEventListener('click', function(e) {\n 'configuration'\n        };\n        return categoryMap[category] || 'other';\n    }\n\n    function formatDate(dateString) {\n        const date = new Date(dateString);\n        const now = new
